title: NETRA Chief Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: NCRTC Express Transit (NETRA) Chief Executive Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 21 May 2026 on the official website www.ncrtc.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NETRA Chief Executive Officer Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: NETRA Chief Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NCRTC Express Transit (NETRA) Chief Executive Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 21 May 2026 on the official website www.ncrtc.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NETRA Chief Executive Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 55 years

qualification.details: Chief Executive Officer: B.E/B.Tech. or its equivalent

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.ncrtc.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NETRA Chief Executive Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the Online application for the NETRA Chief Executive Officer post is 22nd June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Chief Executive Officer post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Chief Executive Officer position is a B.E/B.Tech. degree or its equivalent. Candidates should ensure they meet this requirement before applying.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the NETRA Chief Executive Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Chief Executive Officer post is between 18 years and 55 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules, which can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Chief Executive Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Chief Executive Officer post will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 150000 to Rs. 300000. This is a significant remuneration package for the role.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NETRA Chief Executive Officer job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is Online . Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out, and submit it along with required documents to the specified address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the NETRA Chief Executive Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the NETRA Chief Executive Officer recruitment. This makes the application process more accessible to all eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Chief Executive Officer post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Chief Executive Officer position involves Document Verification and an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for NETRA Chief Executive Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this NETRA recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Chief Executive Officer post is Full Time. This indicates a regular and full-time employment opportunity with NCRTC Express Transit.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of NCRTC Express Transit?
faq.answer: The official website of NCRTC Express Transit (NETRA) is www.ncrtc.in. Candidates can visit this website for more information and to download the application form.
